To: Compliance and Risk Oversight Committee, MedNorth Bancorp, Inc. (EIN 92-7345671; Delaware Division of Corporations File No. D-8745123)
From: Ms. Alina Corbett, Esq., General Counsel, acorbett@mednorthbancorp.example.com, (415) 555-0134
Date: July 7, 2026 — Subject: Reg FD controls for Q2 disclosures; handling of PII under CCPA/HIPAA/GLBA
We will brief IR and business leads before the earnings call; the draft press release is embargoed until 8:30 a.m. ET on July 15 and contains preliminary NCOs and clinic utilization rates not yet furnished on an 8-K.
Under Reg FD and Rule 10b-5, do not selectively disclose: (i) Q2 net interest margin and deposit mix shifts; (ii) interim readouts from PulseBridge Health Services LLC’s device pilot; (iii) any unannounced network contract pricing or payer rebates.
Note that Mr. Theo Park (sell-side analyst, Harbourline Research LLC) requested follow-up after last Friday’s meeting; IR must limit any call to information already public on our website and in filed 8-Ks/10-Qs.
Healthcare operations must exclude PHI from decks and transcripts; no patient names, room numbers, or dates of service—use de-identified aggregates only.
Banking operations must safeguard GLBA NPI; the Treasury Operating Account (acct 000123456789; routing 000000000) at Sojourner Trust Co. is internal-use only and should not appear in any external materials.
For travel compliance, HR retains copies of identification for authorized personnel; Mr. Julian Ortega (VP, Treasury) — US Passport 999999999 — on file pursuant to our record retention schedule.
Corporate address for notice: 1200 Harbor Plaza, Suite 400, San Orfeo, CA 94000; investor inquiries should go to ir@mednorthbancorp.example.com or (212) 555-0179.
The generic SSN 000-00-0000 and Taxpayer ID 00-0000000 appearing on the onboarding template are placeholders only and must never be used or stored as actual data.
For benefits questions from employees, direct callers to 800-555-1212 (public helpline); do not route to Investor Relations.
We intend to furnish an Item 2.02 Form 8-K concurrent with the earnings release; no guidance updates may be given verbally to analysts prior to that furnishing.
A term sheet with Hearthline Health Plan was executed on June 28 with volume-based rate concessions; this has not been announced and must not be discussed until definitive agreements are signed and disclosed.
Reminder: role-only titles (e.g., “Charge Nurse,” “Branch Supervisor”) are acceptable in narratives; avoid including any direct identifiers unless necessary for a regulated filing.
All employees participating in the call must complete the Reg FD and data privacy refresher by July 12; training confirmations will be tracked by Compliance.
Please report any suspected selective disclosure or inadvertent inclusion of PII to compliance@mednorthbancorp.example.com within 24 hours.
